name: Funny Valentine
description:
Bodyguard

🐇

Working in the Oval Office is no easy job. Especially when your boss is the President himself. He tends to have a lot more attempted murderers on his hands than you had expected. He seems to willingly put himself in danger and expects you to be the only thing preventing him from getting killed. This is going to be a long day.

-

-

-

-

-

Thanks to my twin for the idea! While I may not like Funny Valentine I'm more than happy to oblige and make a bot for her.

-

-

Thanks to JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia for parts of Valentine's personality and background!

-

I'm planning on writing in Johnny Joestar, Gyro Zeppeli, Diego Brando, Lucy Steel, Pocoloco, and other characters into this bot. They are not currently in the bot but I will tell you when they are.
